validator_name: Thomas Chisicalondo, modeling team under Garrido-delegated autonomy
authority_basis: User/PI statement in the project record: Garrido nos da autonomia; toma tus decisiones para poder continuar y aplicar RL.

assumptions.capacity_5000: capacity interpretation anchored to the thesis-grounded 5,000-ration release batch
assumptions.full_48h_unavailability: logical consequence of the one-convoy extension
assumptions.partial_load_allowed: explicit departure from the thesis no-partial-delivery simplification
assumptions.partial_load_consumes_full_slot: logical consequence of an indivisible convoy mission
assumptions.r22_semantics: temporary bidirectional route closure; convoy and cargo pause and are preserved

publication_disclosure: DRA-2 is a stylized finite-convoy logistics extension of the thesis-grounded MFSC, not a validated operational reproduction.
